name: init-default-vault
prompt: Initialize a new Obsidian vault from AGENTS.md, then show the created folder structure and templates.
expected_output: Uses scripts/vault_engine.py init and index, creates configured English folders, service state, and templates without hardcoded private examples.

name: queue-ingest-generic
prompt: Process a queue note using the universal source ingest workflow. Identify filename and wikilink topics, preserve useful source content as target updates, write one-paragraph target summaries, and delete the source only after full coverage and current summary state.
expected_output: Generates source-shaped queue tasks with language_policy, applies an LLM plan with updates[], applies summaries in the configured summary language, and finalizes queue only after every target summary hash is recorded.

name: meeting-source-ingest-generic
prompt: Process a new meeting note using the universal source ingest workflow. Fill the meeting summary placeholder when present, extract useful topic updates, and mark the meeting processed without deleting or renaming it.
expected_output: Generates source-shaped meeting tasks with language_policy, applies an LLM plan with source_summary and updates[], creates or updates knowledge targets, and sets agent_processed true only after successful processing.

name: meeting-prep-generic
prompt: Create a future meeting note from a calendar title and date using recent relevant vault context.
expected_output: Generates a meeting-prep task with language_policy, skips if the target already exists, and creates a meeting note with only the configured summary placeholder filled in the configured summary language.
